data.content: Implementation re-run after shipment review rollback. The update command was already merged to main (3cbe24d/12f5605). The rollback was caused by a dirty .gitignore (missing /.knots/ entry). Created branch loom-5a3c-gitignore-fix with commit fd99548 that adds /.knots/ to .gitignore. All sanity gates pass: cargo test (79+18+3 tests), cargo fmt --all --check, cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings.
